#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    // Create a non-const reference to the buffer by const_cast
    auto& non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::vector<uint8_t>&>(buffer);

    // Create a buffer_adaptor object
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    // Check if the requested number of bytes to peek is within the available data
    if (bytes_to_peek > adaptor.size()) {
        return {};
    }

    // Create a destination vector with the appropriate size
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_peek);

    // Use the copy() method to copy data without advancing the read pointer
    adaptor.copy(dest.data(), bytes_to_peek);

    // Return the destination vector containing the peeked data
    return dest;
}
```

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Write header in little-endian format
    adaptor.write(hexi::endian::le(header));
    
    // Serialize the UserData object
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

   template<typename container_type>
   void write_container(container_type& container) {
       using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;

       if constexpr(memcpy_write<container_type, binary_stream>) {
           const auto bytes = container.size() * sizeof(cvalue_type);
           write(container.data(), static_cast<size_type>(bytes));
       } else {
           for(auto& element : container) {
               *this << element;
           }
       }
   }
